rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Tests using PostgreSQL constraint names (e.g., 'submissions_assignment_student_unique') will break on different backends; abstract the error or mock generically.","scope":"src/app/api/assignments/[id]/submit/route.test.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Duplicate submission detection is delegated to the DB unique constraint on (assignment, student) — no pre-check needed, race-safe by default.","scope":"Submissions collection"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Student-facing endpoints read user identity from withAuth context (user.id), never from the request body — body carries only business data.","scope":"api routes"},{"kind":"convention","text":"API responses follow { success, data } | { success: false, error } shape, mirroring the quiz submit reference pattern.","scope":"api routes"}]}
